experiment_track_contract.declared_search_target: TNN Recall@10 >= 90% under later routing evaluation
experiment_track_contract.beam_width_policy: beam width 1 by default; 2, 4, and 8 reserved for later routing fallback studies
experiment_track_contract.transformed_metric_policy: no transformed metric; build, locality, compression, and later routing all use the declared Euclidean metric directly
experiment_track_contract.build_metric_role: section-4 compares leaf-stage candidate behavior under the declared Euclidean metric
experiment_track_contract.locality_metric_role: same-leaf top-10 neighborhood coherence is computed directly under the declared Euclidean metric
experiment_track_contract.compression_metric_role: local-versus-global scalar quantization compares real-entity reconstruction error under the declared Euclidean track
experiment_track_contract.deferred_routing_metric_role: later routing studies must preserve the declared Euclidean ordering and search-target interpretation
metric_contract_consistency_checks: build, locality, compression, and deferred routing all declare the Euclidean metric
no transformed metric is permitted on this track, so ordering preservation is vacuously satisfied
experiment_track_contract.metric_contract_audit_result: metric contract is consistent across build, locality, compression, and deferred routing obligations
experiment_track_contract.dispersion_functional: variance under the declared Euclidean metric

later_phase_identities.label: Held-out routing queries for the realistic harvested qualification tier

frozen_items.label: Primary leaf size and sensitivity sizes
Quantization baseline over real entities only

tier_growth_rule: single canonical realistic qualification tier harvested from the external archival corpus and preserved for repeated section-4 and section-5 qualification runs
